name: conduit-theme
description: Conduit frontend theme, color palette, and global styling changes
context_rules: For global Conduit visual theme changes, prefer frontend/src/index.css before page-specific components.
Use concrete CSS or component style updates; do not add placeholder comments.

patch_strategy.summary: Prepare a low-risk Conduit frontend theme patch.

patches.reason: Global Conduit theme styles should be implemented in the frontend CSS entrypoint
changes: Update global color palette and common UI states

acceptance_template: Conduit frontend pages reflect the requested theme without placeholder code.
conduit_acceptance_checks: The global stylesheet or relevant theme component is located
The requested palette is implemented through concrete CSS or component style changes
